# Runtime dependencies for the sample fixture

requests>=2.31.0
langchain[community]>=0.3,<0.4; python_version>='3.11'
AWS_MCP_Server>=1.0

# Dev tools (unpinned)
pytest

# VCS dep — not a PyPI package, must be skipped
vcs-dep @ git+https://github.com/example/vcs-dep.git

# options line — must be skipped
-r base-requirements.txt

# pip-compile style inline comment — must be parsed, comment stripped
boto3==1.26.0  # via aws-cdk-lib

# hash-locked (pip install --require-hashes) — must be parsed, hashes stripped
urllib3==1.26.5 --hash=sha256:abc123def456 --hash=sha256:789xyzabc000
